sentences.base_language: I like learning languages but it is very hard
sentences.target_language: 我喜欢学语言，但是很难
sentences.romanized: wǒ xǐhuān xué yǔyán, dànshì hěn nán

sentences.base_language: I am not very good at speaking spanish
sentences.target_language: 我说西班牙语说得不太好
sentences.romanized: wǒ shuō xībānyá yǔ shuō de bú tài hǎo

sentences.base_language: I learned with other apps and they were great too
sentences.target_language: 我用其他应用程序学习，它们也很棒
sentences.romanized: wǒ yòng qítā yìngyòng chéngxù xuéxí, tāmen yě hěn bàng

sentences.base_language: But I made this app to do more "immersion"
sentences.target_language: 但是我做了这个应用来做更多的"沉浸式学习"
sentences.romanized: dànshì wǒ zuò le zhège yìngyòng lái zuò gèng duō de "chénjìn shì xuéxí"
nǐ kěyǐ hé wǒ yīqǐ xué

sentences.base_language: I tried to make this easy to use but I may have made mistakes
sentences.target_language: 我尽量让这个容易使用，但我可能犯了一些错误
sentences.romanized: wǒ jìnliàng ràng zhège róngyì shǐyòng, dàn wǒ kěnéng fàn le yīxiē cuòwù

sentences.base_language: If you want to help me, that would be cool
sentences.target_language: 如果你想帮我，那太好了
sentences.romanized: rúguǒ nǐ xiǎng bāng wǒ, nà tài hǎo le

sentences.base_language: If you like this website, please share it
sentences.target_language: 如果你喜欢这个网站，请分享它
sentences.romanized: rúguǒ nǐ xǐhuān zhège wǎngzhàn, qǐng fēnxiǎng tā

sentences.base_language: If you know other languages, you can make lessons!
sentences.target_language: 如果你会其他语言，你可以创建课程！
sentences.romanized: rúguǒ nǐ huì qítā yǔyán, nǐ kěyǐ chuàngjiàn kèchéng!

sentences.base_language: If you can't help that is OK
sentences.target_language: 如果你帮不了也没关系
sentences.romanized: rúguǒ nǐ bāng bù liǎo yě méi guānxi

sentences.base_language: I am happy you are learning with me either way
sentences.target_language: 不管怎样，我很高兴你和我一起学习
sentences.romanized: bùguǎn zěnyàng, wǒ hěn gāoxìng nǐ hé wǒ yīqǐ xuéxí
